name: Spicy Orange Vinaigrette (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the orange juice over high heat until it reduces to form a syrup. Allow the syrup to cool slightly.
2. Transfer the cooled orange syrup to a blender.
3. Add the minced onion, lime juice, dijon mustard, ancho chile powder, and red wine vinegar to the blender.
4. Blend for 30 seconds.
5. With the blender running, slowly pour in the olive oil until the dressing emulsifies.
6. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
Yield: 3/4 cup
